name: Mex-Corn Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and drain excess fat.
2. Add corn, tomato sauce, picante sauce, chili powder, and cumin to the skillet. Stir frequently for 5 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together cottage cheese, eggs, Parmesan cheese, oregano, and garlic salt until well combined.
4. Spread 6 tortillas on the bottom and up sides of a lightly greased 13x9x2 inch baking dish, overlapping as needed.
5. Top with half of the meat mixture, followed by the cheese mixture.
6. Arrange remaining tortillas over the cheese, overlapping as necessary.
7. Finish with the remaining meat mixture.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for about 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
9. Remove from oven, sprinkle with cheddar cheese, and let stand for 10 minutes before serving with additional picante sauce.
